description: World regions shaded by data value intensity (5 tiers: very low to very high). Best for global comparisons — GDP, military spending, corruption index, internet penetration, disease rates.

fields.TITLE_TEXT: Headline, e.g. 'MILITARY SPENDING BY REGION' or 'CORRUPTION INDEX 2024'
fields.CONTEXT_TEXT: Source or summary line, e.g. 'Source: World Bank 2024'
fields.LABEL_1: Name of the metric shown in the legend, e.g. 'MILITARY SPENDING' or 'CORRUPTION SCORE'
